parents.subject: LU-19961 tcu: lfs trash state returns state for symlink

commit.subject: LU-19978 tcu: lfs trash unrm should work with relative path
commit.message:
LU-19978 tcu: lfs trash unrm should work with relative path

This patch fixes "lfs trash unrm" command to make it work
correctly to restore a file by using a relative path.

Add sanityn/test_118o.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Yingjin Qian <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I36267b27957ea598dffec8d1a0aaf7f0473b5ad1
